metadata.description: Creative Core Cloud plugins for Claude — AI agent tooling and connectors.

plugins.name: oriel
plugins.description: Oriel — agent control surface for the shared Agent Board (Workspace > Project > Epic > Story > Task). Remote MCP (OAuth) at mcp.ori3l.com/abm + the /oriel command (start project · start/stop loop · tick · check board · update-board).

plugins.name: oriel-v2-preview
plugins.description: PREVIEW — the Koyeb-hosted Agent Board v2 at https://mcp.ori3l.com/v2/ (off Supabase), for dual-run dogfooding. Registers the agent-board-v2 MCP server; set ORIEL_BOARD_ABK in your env for auth. Install alongside oriel to compare v1 vs v2.
